{{Quote|The short guy is Usu Cley—he's from Rimsoo Five, about ninety kilometers toward the south pole from here. Cley was the Ninth Fleet Middle-Mass Champion two years running. I've seen him fight a couple of times—he's very good.|[[Jos Vondar]], to [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]]|<ref name="Battle Surgeons" />}}
'''Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 5''' was a [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit]] stationed on the jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. It serviced the personnel of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] at the [[Battle of Drongar]] alongside other surgical units under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[D'Arc Vaetes]]. It, with all the other Republic forces on the planet, left when the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] mutated and became useless.<ref name="Battle Surgeons" />
